_comment: Retainer registry. Each org leebaroneau manages patches for. retainer_status='active' means new pipeline-core releases auto-cascade to that org's consumer repos via push-patches.mjs; 'inactive' means consumers stay frozen at pinned_version.

orgs.name: leebaroneau
orgs.notes: Personal org. Managed by this repo's own fleet workflow.

orgs.name: Haverford-Brands
orgs.notes: Primary commercial org. Receives all patch cascades.
